content: {"id":"fb_1782068132195_75os1b","signal":"positive","context":"2026-06-21 Amp CLI two-Mac install in mac-yolo-safeguards","submittedContext":"2026-06-21 Amp CLI two-Mac install in mac-yolo-safeguards","relatedFeedbackId":null,"lastAction":null,"whatWentWrong":"Amp usage failed on both hosts with Invalid or missing API key; install is complete but actual Amp use is blocked by Amp login/OAuth/API key. Amp Free is documented for interactive CLI/editor use, while -x execute mode consumes paid credits.","whatToChange":"For future Amp installs, separate install/yolo-permission proof from auth proof; do not claim free operational use until amp usage succeeds or amp login completes. Keep amp-yolo interactive and avoid calling -x free.","whatWorked":"Installed official Amp CLI 0.0.1782062050-gbe2b79 on local Igor’s MacBook Pro and ssh macmini; created ~/.local/bin/amp-yolo wrapper using ~/.config/amp/yolo-settings.json; verified command exists on both hosts; permission evaluator for Bash rm -rf /tmp/amp-permission-test-nonexistent changed to action=allow via user tool wildcard rule; simulator LaunchAgent guard verified run interval 60s on both hosts.","reasoning":null,"visualEvidence":null,"conversationWindow":null,"distillation":null,"tags":["amp","macmini","macbook-pro","amp-yolo","permissions","oauth","simulator-guard"],"skill":null,"failureType":null,"rubric":null,"actionType":"store-learning","actionReason":null,"structuredRule":null,"gateAction":null,"timestamp":"2026-06-21T18:55:32.195Z","richContext":{"domain":"general","filePaths":[],"errorType":null,"outcomeCategory":"standard-success","enforcement":{"scopeViolation":false,"approvalFailure":false,"protectedFileViolation":false,"protectedFiles":[]}}}
